hero.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
hero.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

aries.general: Today is a day of adventure. Don't hesitate to take risks and explore new avenues.
aries.love: Passion ignites in your relationships—be ready for spontaneous romantic gestures.
aries.career: Professional life may see some turbulence, but it can lead you to unexpected opportunities.

taurus.general: Steady progress is key today. Focus on your long-term goals and avoid distractions.
taurus.love: Today is a great day for deep conversations. Share your feelings with your partner.
taurus.career: Trust your instincts when making decisions today; they might lead you towards success.

gemini.general: Communication is your strength today. Make connections that could benefit you greatly.
gemini.love: A chance encounter could spark a new relationship or revive an old flame.
gemini.career: Teamwork will take center stage. Embrace collaboration for better results at work.

cancer.general: Enjoy the comfort of your home today. Nurture what makes you feel secure.
cancer.love: Show appreciation for your loved ones; small gestures will mean a lot now.
cancer.career: Your emotional intelligence will help you navigate company dynamics successfully.

leo.general: Your charisma is magnetic today. Use it to attract opportunities and make connections.
leo.love: Romance is vibrant, and you'll find joy in the little things with your partner.
leo.career: Ambition drives you; take the lead in your projects and demonstrate your capabilities.

virgo.general: Practicality will guide you today, helping you make wise decisions.
virgo.love: A calm day for relationships; focus on strengthening your bond with patience and kindness.
virgo.career: Attention to detail will pay off; review your work and make necessary improvements.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: The only limit to our realization of tomorrow is our doubts of today.
professional.author: Franklin D. Roosevelt

professional.text: Your work is going to fill a large part of your life, and the only way to be truly satisfied is to do what you believe is great work.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: Success is not the key to happiness. Happiness is the key to success. If you love what you are doing, you will be successful.
professional.author: Albert Schweitzer

motivation.text: The only way to achieve the impossible is to believe it is possible.
motivation.author: Charles Kingsleigh

motivation.text: Keep your face always toward the sunshine—and shadows will fall behind you.
motivation.author: Walt Whitman

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: It does not matter how slowly you go as long as you do not stop.
motivation.author: Confucius

motivation.text: The future depends on what you do today.
motivation.author: Mahatma Gandhi

captions.text: Hustle until your haters ask if you’re hiring.
Be a voice, not an echo.
Dream big, work hard, stay focused.

tech.text: The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
tech.author: Alan Kay

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: It's not a faith in technology. It's faith in people.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: The real problem is not whether machines think but whether men do.
tech.author: B.F. Skinner

tech.text: The science of today is the technology of tomorrow.
tech.author: Edward Teller

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

fun.text: I am on a seafood diet. I see food and I eat it.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I'm reading a book on anti-gravity. It's impossible to put down!
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: I'm on a whiskey diet. I've lost three days already!
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: Parallel lines have so much in common. It’s a shame they’ll never meet.
fun.author: Anonymous

fun.text: Did you hear about the mathematician who’s afraid of negative numbers? He’ll stop at nothing to avoid them.
fun.author: Anonymous

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don't see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: Keep your faith strong, and you will find your way through any storm.
Faith sees the invisible, believes the unbelievable, and receives the impossible.
faith.author: Corrie ten Boom

faith.text: Let your faith be bigger than your fear.
Where there is faith, there is hope.
Faith is the strength by which a shattered world shall emerge into the light.
faith.author: Helen Keller

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: Wisdom is not a product of schooling, but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: Wisdom is the reward you get for a lifetime of listening when you would rather have talked.
wisdom.author: Mark Twain

wisdom.text: The invariable mark of wisdom is to see the miraculous in the common.
wisdom.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

wisdom.text: The journey of a thousand miles begins with one step.
wisdom.author: Lao Tzu
